text: I really like this version. How can we select this as a preferred variation as part of our evolution by artificial selection paradigm?

snapshot.title: Title TK
snapshot.subtitle: Phase 12 proof
snapshot.prompt: Irregular cluster of geometric panels at varied scales and orientations — a loose population of candidates under selection pressure, not arranged on a grid. Flat vector style with subtle gradients. Muted palette of deep indigo, teal, and warm off-white. Organic spacing, overlapping shapes at slight angles, some panels fading at their edges. Minimal lines, no text, no literal machinery or AI imagery. Slight grain texture. Evokes iteration, refinement, and organic variation without being on-the-nose.
